name: Bananas with Green Split Peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the peas in enough water to cover until tender, about 1 1/2 hours.
2. Peel the bananas and lay them whole on top of the peas without mixing. Cook for 10 minutes. Add water if necessary to prevent sticking.
3. Meanwhile, heat the oil and brown the onions. With a slotted spoon, remove the bananas and peas and add them to the onions. Sprinkle in the salt and cook over medium heat, stirring gently but constantly, until the oil has been absorbed. Serve hot.
